prompt:
PR #6 has merge conflicts after PR #5 was merged to main. Rebase the branch onto main and resolve conflicts.

The PR adds Fly.io custom domain and TLS certificate provisioning to deploy workflows. PR #5 (which is now on main) added DNS management with a Go CLI tool, CUE DNS schema, and dns.yml workflow.

Rebase onto main, resolve any conflicts (keeping both sets of changes), ensure cue vet passes, and force-push the branch.
